post.title: The Post-Board Meeting Lock-In
post.body:
Last week we presented to the board and came away with a focused dose of reality. On one hand, the need for cost reduction was unavoidable due to the lack of new revenue to match our original plan. On the other hand, our focus with Canva and Jar overall was resoundingly accepted and supported.

More details below in the formal board recap!

week.text: Cost plan finalized with CFO Q1-2026
CEO Dashboard + Board recap to full team
Review new Jar roadmap with Arnoe

month.text: Revamp GTM with Canva + production lead
CHIPS Alpha launch to 20+ designers and 10 sample clients
AI for Operators course delivered to network
